plural: Veterinary Behaviour Specialists | **Fit:** 9.0 | Dog And Cat Behaviour Problems — Aggression, Anxiety, Compulsive Disorders. Referral From Vets + Direct Owner Enquiry.s

services.title: Aggression Management
services.body: Tailored programs to address aggressive behaviors in dogs and cats.

services.title: Anxiety Relief
services.body: Strategies for reducing anxiety through environmental enrichment and training.

services.title: Compulsive Disorder Treatment
services.body: Specialised interventions for pets with compulsive disorders.

services.title: Behavioural Assessments
services.body: Comprehensive evaluations to understand your pet's behavior issues.

services.title: Training Sessions
services.body: One-on-one training sessions with certified specialists.

services.title: Consultation Services
services.body: Expert advice and support for pet owners dealing with challenging behaviors.

faqs.q: Do you work with referrals from vets?
faqs.a: Yes, we accept referrals from veterinarians and also welcome direct enquiries from pet owners.

faqs.q: What types of behavior problems do you address?
faqs.a: We specialize in aggression, anxiety, compulsive disorders, and other challenging behaviors in dogs and cats.

faqs.q: How long does a consultation take?
faqs.a: Consultations typically last 1-2 hours depending on the complexity of the case.

faqs.q: Can you provide ongoing support after an initial assessment?
faqs.a: Absolutely, we offer follow-up sessions and continuous support to ensure lasting behavioral improvements.
